comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body: Plan-review advisory remediated: docs/coverage.md update (parent AC-3) assigned to child story 8d36 — added to its Scope + Acceptance Criteria. Also updated 8d36 file-impact to include docs/coverage.md.

compiled_state.description:
## Context

`gerrit-verify.yaml` (the Gerrit `Verified` gate) has a critical path of
`clear-vote → require-ticket → build-and-test → vote` with a measured wall clock of
~32–42 min, dominated by the `build-and-test` matrix. Measured evidence (default
suite, 5,701 tests, `-m "not integration and not external"`) recorded on ticket
crushable-choosable-llama (7654):

- serial + branch-coverage (the EXACT current CI command): 1361s pytest / ~1700s incl. report.
- `pytest -n4 --dist worksteal`: 331s (no cov) / 351s (+cov) → **~5× faster**, with
  **byte-identical outcomes** to serial (5877 pass / 14 skip / same 1 known-Py3.14 fail).
- Coverage overhead is only ~6% at -n4 → KEEP coverage on the gate.
- No pip caching exists in any workflow; the heavy `.[dev]`→`[agents]` stack is rebuilt
  every job. Measured cold vs warm install: 19s → 9s locally (halves install).

This epic delivers three assurance-neutral, proven changes: (#1) parallelize the test
run with pytest-xdist, (#2) add pip caching, (#6) bake per-test performance logging into
the gate. All three are validated by local experiments (see child tickets); none changes
what is tested, the coverage measured, or the matrix breadth.

## Scope (this epic)

- IN: pytest-xdist parallelization of the default tier + non-live integration; pip
  caching on all `setup-python` steps; `--durations` per-test logging + optional
  `.test_durations` store. Applied to `gerrit-verify.yaml` (and `test.yml` for parity).
- OUT (separate follow-up epic): factoring platform-independent gates out of the matrix,
  de-duplicating mypy/ruff, taking require-ticket off the critical path, tiered matrix.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] `gerrit-verify` build-and-test test step runs under pytest-xdist pinned to the
      runner's real core count; measured test-step wall clock drops from ~22 min to ~6 min.
- [ ] Reported coverage under xdist equals the serial value (≥ `fail_under = 70`); no
      orphaned `.coverage.*` files leak into the checkout.
- [ ] Test OUTCOMES under xdist are identical to serial (no new failures, no
      isolation/leak-guard regressions); every child change passes CI (`Verified +1`).
- [ ] pip cache hit reduces per-job install time on repeat runs.
- [ ] Every gate run logs its slowest tests (`--durations`).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All three child stories/tasks are closed.
- [ ] The changes are landed on `main` through Gerrit.
- [ ] `docs/coverage.md` (and any CI docs) updated to note the xdist + `parallel=true`
      coverage-combine requirement.
compiled_state.title: Speed up gerrit-verify: xdist test parallelization + pip cache + per-test perf logging
